description: 🚨 Life comes at you fast… batteries die faster 😂 • Keys locked in the car? ✔️ • Battery dead at the gas pump? ✔️ • Car won’t start right when you’re already late? ✔️ Yeah… we see it every single day 😅 Good news is—you don’t have to stress about it. 📞 830-265-7887 (save it now before you need it) We’re out here 24/7 covering: Marble Falls • Granite Shoals • Horseshoe Bay • Cottonwood Shores • Spicewood • Burnet ✔️ Towing ✔️ Lockouts ✔️ Jump Starts 💥 Pro tip: If you’re ever in an accident, you can request YOUR tow company… don’t let them just call whoever. ⸻ 👉 Be honest… what’s the worst place your car has ever left you stranded? Drop it in the comments 😂 (We’ve seen some wild ones…)

layoutDescription: Full-bleed hero photo with directional gradient overlay (not centered vignette); headline anchored bottom-left or bottom-right; strong contrast type; optional sticky mobile call bar.
antiPatterns: No food menu language. Gallery should showcase work, not template beauty shots.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
